semantics: Every available wall image is an immutable, hash-bound review facet. A facet is complete only through solid multi-reviewer consensus or an explicit second-desk/owner enforcement; one machine vote never establishes identity.

second-desk.authority: semantic review and enforceable obvious-negative rulings

scopes.label: Star Trek wall baseline
scopes.note: Gold-shard method proof. Portraits must show the human performer out of character; stills must depict the performed character. Exact identity and presentation are reviewed independently.
